#
### **Description** If you like my other pack: **https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-harnesses** and you like **Fresh Animations** then this pack is perfect for you! 3D Harnesses is a Resource Pack that well... Makes Your Happy Ghast Harness 3D! But with Fresh animation support! #
### **IMPORTANT!!!** When using both packs **make sure the the harness pack is above the ghast pack** ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3772bbf2500e2e061be0152a59825ada4e525e53.png)
# ### **Requirements**
